package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_method_returns_partially_built_scopes_for_caller_chaining: Repositories that expose scope-building fragments instead of complete query APIs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule129NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule129NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule129NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario129Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule129NegativeService, input Rule129NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
